name: Chicken Soup with Greens and Shiitake Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 2-inch piece fresh ginger, cut into coins
1/2 pound fresh Shiitake or oyster mushrooms
1/2 pound Napa or other green cabbage, thinly sliced and stems removed
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin from the chicken and place it in a soup pot.
2. Add the stock, wine, ginger, and onions; bring to a simmer.
3. Simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through, skimming any scum or fat that rises to the surface. Do not boil the stock as this will make it cloudy.
4. Remove the stems from the Shiitake mushrooms and add them to the stock.
5. Quickly sauté the Shiitake caps in drops of olive oil until lightly browned; set aside.
6. Remove the chicken from the pot and cut the meat into long slivers, discarding the bones.
7. Strain the stock carefully, discarding the ginger, onions, and mushroom stems.
8. Wash out the pot and add the cabbage; cook for 2 minutes.
9. Add the chicken, spinach, and sesame oil; cook for an additional minute.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste and serve immediately.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
